innerBlocks.innerHTML: Grow Premium Seating Revenue Across Resorts and Waterparks
Built for operations managers and commercial decision makers, LounGenie improves guest flow, speeds poolside service, and helps premium seating deliver stronger daily revenue.

content:
Smart Cabana System — Zero Upfront Cost

Turn Premium Seating Into A Revenue Engine, At $0 Upfront

The LounGenie turns cabanas, daybeds, and premium seating into revenue-producing guest environments with QR ordering, a waterproof safe, solar-powered USB charging, and a removable ice bucket in one commercial-grade unit. Hotels, resorts, waterparks, and cruise lines can launch with no upfront cost.

Get Your Free Revenue Projection Explore Features
$0 Upfront Revenue Share Model Built in Canada
30%+

Poolside F&B uplift reported after operators add the LounGenie to premium seating.

Zero upfront cost · Revenue share · PoolSafe installs and services.

Trusted By Hospitality Leaders

Used by top hotels, resorts, cruise lines, and waterparks worldwide.

The Core Problem

Your Pool Deck Is Leaking Revenue Every Hour.

Every pool deck loses revenue the same three ways. Guests leave to charge phones. They skip food orders because no server is nearby. They cut their stay short because they do not trust leaving valuables on a lounge chair. Every hour a guest walks off the deck is a missed food and beverage opportunity. The LounGenie solves all three problems at the guest’s seat.

Guests leave to charge A dead phone sends guests off the pool deck. Without charging at the seat, they leave — and often don’t come back.
Orders get skipped When no server is nearby and there’s no easy way to order, guests settle for less and your food and beverage revenue drops.
Valuables send guests home early Guests who don’t trust leaving their phone and wallet on a lounge chair cut their visit short. Every early departure is lost spend.

How It Works

One Unit. Four Features. Higher Spend Per Guest.

Order

Order at the seat — no app required.

Guests scan a QR code to order food and drinks — the order prints on a dedicated printer provided by PoolSafe. A service call button alerts staff via a touchscreen monitor showing exactly which cabana needs attention. No app download. No POS integration. No added labor.

Stash

A waterproof safe guests actually use.

Guests lock phones, wallets, and room keys inside the cabana with a waterproof keypad safe. When valuables are secure, guests stay longer and spend more. STASH is consistently the feature guests mention most in reviews.

Charge

Solar-powered charging — no wiring, no permits.

Solar panels power USB charging from sunrise to sunset at no electricity cost. When guests can charge poolside, they stop leaving the deck. And when they stay, they order.

Chill

Cold drinks at arm’s reach drive repeat orders.

A removable ice bucket keeps drinks cold at the seat for hours. Cold beverages within arm’s reach encourage high-margin repeat orders throughout the afternoon — without a server needing to check in.

Guest Journey

A Guest Journey That Increases Dwell Time And Spend.

1
Lock valuables in the built-in safe They lock their phone, wallet, and room key in the built-in waterproof safe. Guests stop worrying and start relaxing.
2
Plug in and stay charged at the seat They plug a device into the solar-powered USB charging port. No outlet needed. No leaving the deck.
3
Scan to order, press for service They scan a QR code to place a food and beverage order, which prints on a dedicated PoolSafe printer. The service call button sends a separate alert to the staff touchscreen showing exactly which cabana needs attention.
4
Drinks stay cold. Guests stay longer. Their beverages stay cold in the removable ice bucket at arm’s reach. The guest stays longer, orders more, and your servers only move when someone is ready to spend.

Installations

See the LounGenie in real resort and waterpark settings.

View full gallery →

The Business Model

We Install It. We Service It. You Keep The Revenue.

The LounGenie operates on a revenue-share model with zero upfront cost and zero install burden on your team. We provide the hardware, fly to your property for full installation, and handle ongoing service while you capture more F&B and premium seating revenue from day one.

Get Your Free Revenue Projection

Every Venue Type

Hotels, resorts, waterparks, cruise lines, and surf parks.

From a handful of cabanas to hundreds of premium seating areas, the LounGenie scales cleanly across outdoor hospitality environments with a modular footprint, solar charging, and zero upfront cost.

Hotels + Resorts

Upgrade daybeds, cabanas, and reserved lounge zones. Guests spend more when valuables are secure, devices are charged, and ordering is instant.

Waterparks + Attractions

Handle high guest volume with stronger ordering flow and premium seat convenience. When guests stop leaving to charge or order, dwell time — and spend — goes up.

Cruise Lines + Specialty Venues

Weather-rated, solar-powered, and fully modular. The LounGenie works in premium outdoor seating environments including surf parks, country clubs, and aquatic centers.

Why Guests Spend More

Two behavioral shifts drive stronger revenue.

Guests Stop Leaving The Deck.

When valuables are locked in the waterproof safe and devices are charging, guests stop leaving the pool area. Longer stays mean more ordering windows — more drinks, more food, more spend per visit.

Ordering Becomes Instant.

A QR code or service call button removes the gap between “I want a drink” and “I placed an order.” No flagging servers. No missed sales. No friction.

Cabana/Food & Beverage Director, Cowabunga Bay Waterpark

IAAPA Brass Ring Award Recipient

PoolSafe Inc. received this recognition for developing a solution that measurably enhances the guest experience while delivering operational and revenue impact for operators. One of the highest honors in the attractions and hospitality industry.

Side-by-Side Comparison

Standard cabana vs. a cabana equipped with the LounGenie.

Category Standard Cabana ✓ With LounGenie
ValuablesGuest worries or leaves early✓ Locked in a waterproof safe
Phone ChargingGuest leaves the deck✓ Solar-powered USB charging at the seat
Ordering Food & DrinksFlag down a server or walk to the bar✓ Service call button alerts staff · QR scan prints order on PoolSafe printer
Cold BeveragesDrinks warm up quickly✓ Removable ice bucket keeps drinks cold for hours
Revenue per CabanaMinimal — passive furniture✓ Incremental F&B captured throughout the day
Upfront Cost to PropertyN/A✓ $0 — revenue share model
Service & RepairsProperty handles repairs✓ PoolSafe handles full installation and service

FAQ

Operator Questions, Answered.

Is there any upfront cost?

No. LounGenie operates on a revenue-share model. Zero capital outlay, zero risk. We provide the hardware, installation, and ongoing service.

Is installation really included?

Yes. Our team flies to your property for on-site installation. No electrical wiring, no permits, no downtime required — the system is solar-powered and fully modular.

What type of properties does the LounGenie serve?

Hotels, resorts, waterparks, cruise lines, surf parks, country clubs, and municipal aquatic centers. If you have premium outdoor seating, LounGenie fits.

What does each unit include?

STASH (waterproof keypad safe), CHARGE (solar USB ports), CHILL (removable ice bucket), and ORDER (QR code and/or service call button, depending on configuration).

How To Get Started

Three steps from conversation to launch.

1. We assess your property.

We review your layout, cabana count, and premium seating areas.

2. We handle full installation.

No wiring, no permits, no downtime. Our team comes to your property.

3. You earn from Day 1.

New F&B revenue starts from the first day guests interact with the units.
